description: Machine-readable definitions of every check the audit pipeline runs. Consumed by scripts/audit.sh.

checks.intent: every claim in the ledger appears in git diff, and every git diff entry was claimed
checks.fail_condition: set difference is non-empty in either direction

checks.intent: each ledger row's sha_after matches the current sha of the file
checks.fail_condition: any sha_after differs from current sha

checks.intent: files marked must_exist are present and at least min_bytes; must_not_exist are absent
checks.fail_condition: file absent OR smaller than min_bytes OR exists when forbidden

checks.intent: files match (or do not match) the patterns specified in the contract
checks.fail_condition: pattern absent when required OR present when forbidden

checks.intent: command exits as expected and stdout matches if specified
checks.fail_condition: exit code != expect_exit OR stdout fails expected pattern OR timeout reached

checks.intent: subjective criteria evaluated by the critic sub-agent
no new TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX/NOCOMMIT comments in changed files
no NotImplementedError / 'not implemented' / Kotlin TODO() / Rust unimplemented!() / panic!('unimplemented')
checks.tool: regex sweep over changed lines (AST walk is roadmap, not yet implemented)

ast_checks.python: function body is exactly Pass | Constant(Ellipsis) | Raise(NotImplementedError-like)
ast_checks.typescript: arrow function body is { throw new Error(...) } with /not.implemented/i in the message

checks.fail_condition: ≥1 stub body in any changed file

checks.intent: no debug statements left in changed source files
checks.fail_condition: ≥1 match in any changed non-test file

checks.intent: every changed file parses in its language
no tests were skipped in this session that were not skipped before
checks.fail_condition: any test file has a new skip not present in pre.json

checks.intent: no Bash tool call in this session exited non-zero without being addressed
checks.fail_condition: any session Bash call has exit_code != 0 and no later message references the failure

checks.intent: an independent critic, with no conversation history, agrees the contract is satisfied
checks.fail_condition: critic returns verdict != VERIFIED with confidence ≥0.7

severity_resolution.from-contract: use the criterion's own severity field
severity_resolution.warning_to_verdict: no criticals + any warning → VERIFIED WITH WARNINGS
severity_resolution.clean_to_verdict: no failures of any kind + critic confidence ≥0.8 → VERIFIED

iteration_policy.on_max_reached: stop iterating; emit report with verdict=NOT VERIFIED + iteration_capped=true; surface unresolved criteria to user verbatim
